name: Fresh Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds top sirloin or chuck beef, cut into 1-inch cubes
1 pound carrots, peeled & cut into chunks
1 pound celery, cleaned & cut into chunks
1/2 pound leeks, white part only, cut into chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt shortening in a large saucepan.
2. Add onions and shallots. Sauté 5 minutes or until tender.
3. Dredge the meat in flour, shaking off excess. Add meat to onion mixture. Sauté until meat is lightly browned, about 10 minutes.
4. Add beef broth. Cook until meat is almost done, about 30 minutes.
5. Add carrots, celery, leeks, and tomatoes. Cover and simmer over medium heat for about 20 minutes.
6. Add potatoes and cook an additional 20 to 25 minutes, or until vegetables are tender.
7. If needed, add more beef broth. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Makes 6 to 8 servings.
